title: pleopeltis linearis var. steniste
intro: Pleopeltis linearis var. steniste is a species of epiphytic fern native to Mexico and Central America, characterized by its linear leaflets and unique growth habit. The medicinal properties of Pleopeltis linearis var. steniste include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Pleopeltis linearis var. steniste are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water or as a tincture, and can be used to create teas, salves, and other topical applications.
